content:
✨ koodo-reader | JavaScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Managing and reading a diverse collection of ebooks across multiple devices and platforms with cloud synchronization and advanced reading features.
✨ Key Features: • Extensive format support (EPUB, PDF, MOBI, AZW3, TXT, FB2, CBR, CBZ, MD, DOCX, HTML, etc.) • Cross-platform availability (Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, iOS, Web)
📖 Summary: Koodo Reader is a versatile, cross-platform ebook manager and reader that supports a wide array of formats. It offers seamless syncing and backup capabilities across multiple cloud storage services and operating systems, enhancing the reading experience with features like AI-powered tools and customizable display options.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
